heading: Short title
label: 3901 Short title
text: This chapter may be cited as the “Servicemembers Civil Relief Act”.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 501 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1 of , , provided that this Act could be cited as the Soldiers’ and Sailors’ Relief Act of 1940, prior to the general amendment of this Act by .act Oct. 17, 1940, ch. 88854 Stat. 1178Pub. L. 108–189

Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 108–189, § 3117 Stat. 2866Dec. 19, 2003“The amendment made by section 1 [enacting this chapter] shall apply to any case that is not final before the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Dec. 19, 2003

Short Title of 2021 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–285, § 1134 Stat. 4878Jan. 5, 2021“This Act [amending ] may be cited as the ‘Protecting Families of Fallen Servicemembers Act’.”section 3956 of this title

Short Title of 2016 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 114–142, § 1130 Stat. 326Mar. 31, 2016“This Act [amending and provisions set out as notes under ] may be cited as the ‘Foreclosure Relief and Extension for Servicemembers Act of 2015’.”section 3953 of this titlesection 3953 of this title

Short Title of 2014 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 113–286, § 1128 Stat. 3093Dec. 18, 2014“This Act [amending provisions set out as notes under ] may be cited as the ‘Foreclosure Relief and Extension for Servicemembers Act of 2014’.”section 3953 of this title

Short Title of 2010 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 111–346, § 1124 Stat. 3622Dec. 29, 2010“This Act [amending provisions set out as a note under ] may be cited as the ‘Helping Heroes Keep Their Homes Act of 2010’.”section 3953 of this title

Short Title of 2009 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 111–97, § 1123 Stat. 3007Nov. 11, 2009“This Act [amending sections 3998, 4001, and 4025 of this title and enacting provisions set out as notes under sections 3998, 4001, and 4025 of this title] may be cited as the ‘Military Spouses Residency Relief Act’.”

Short Title of 1991 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–12, § 1105 Stat. 34Mar. 18, 1991“This Act [see Tables for classification] may be cited as the ‘Soldiers’ and Sailors’ Civil Relief Act Amendments of 1991’.”

Short Title of 1942 Amendment, , provided:Act Oct. 6, 1942, ch. 581, § 156 Stat. 769“That this Act [see Tables for classification] may be cited as the ‘Soldiers’ and Sailors’ Civil Relief Act Amendments of 1942’.”
